message:
fix: HNSW MinHeap/MaxHeap used raw .dist comparison — NaN broke heap ordering

heapCmp was added for NaN-safe distance comparison but was only used
in result array sorts, not inside the heap's bubbleUp/sinkDown. With
NaN distances (from degenerate vectors), NaN < x and NaN > x both
return false, so NaN items got stuck at insertion position and
corrupted heap invariants. Now both heaps use heapCmp consistently.
